summary: Iteration 8 testing complete - Marketing Agency module fully verified. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified including Agency panel with 4 tabs (Produtos, Regras, Aprovacoes, Acesso), product/rule forms, and sidebar Agency button in yellow.
critical_code_review_comments: Agency module (agency.py) correctly implements Products, Rules, Campaigns, Approvals, Reports, Access Control
check_agency_access() properly validates admin role or explicit access grant
Products have metrics dict with ctr, cpc, cpa, roas, conversions, spend, revenue fields
Rules have conditions (metric+operator+value) and actions (type+params) structure
Agency panel shows dynamic name: '{agent_name} Agency' (e.g., 'NovaClawAgency')
Sidebar shows 'Agencia' button in yellow (var(--accent)) only when user has access
Access tab only visible for admin users
All 4 tabs properly implemented: Produtos, Regras, Aprovacoes, Acesso
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - using existing admin user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 added Marketing Agency module. Key test points: 1) GET /api/agency/access/check returns has_access:true for admin. 2) POST /api/agency/products creates product with metrics. 3) GET /api/agency/products lists products. 4) DELETE /api/agency/products/{id} deletes product. 5) POST /api/agency/campaigns creates campaign linked to product. 6) POST /api/agency/rules creates rule with conditions/actions. 7) GET /api/agency/rules lists rules. 8) PUT /api/agency/rules/{id}/toggle toggles active state. 9) GET /api/agency/approvals returns approval queue. 10) GET /api/agency/reports/agency returns overview. 11) POST /api/agency/access/grant grants access. 12) Agency panel UI shows 4 tabs. 13) Sidebar 'Agencia' button visible for admin in yellow.

backend_api.GET /api/agency/access/list: PASS - Returns access list for admin
backend_api.POST /api/agency/products: PASS - Creates product with metrics (ctr, cpc, cpa, roas, conversions, spend, revenue)
backend_api.POST /api/agency/campaigns: PASS - Creates campaign linked to product
backend_api.POST /api/agency/rules: PASS - Creates rule with conditions and actions
backend_api.GET /api/agency/reports/agency: PASS - Returns agency overview with products_count, total_spend, total_revenue, overall_roas, active_rules, pending_approvals
backend_api.POST /api/agency/access/grant: PASS - Grants access to user email

frontend_ui.Agency panel opens: PASS - Modal with dynamic title '{agent_name} Agency'
frontend_ui.Tab: Produtos: PASS - Shows 'Novo Produto' button and product form
frontend_ui.Tab: Regras: PASS - Shows 'Nova Regra' button with condition/action dropdowns
frontend_ui.Tab: Aprovacoes: PASS - Shows approval queue (empty: 'Nenhuma aprovacao pendente')
frontend_ui.Tab: Acesso: PASS - Admin-only tab for granting access
frontend_ui.Product form fields: PASS - Nome, Nicho, Publico-alvo, Orcamento mensal
frontend_ui.Rule form dropdowns: PASS - Metric (CPA, CPC, CTR, etc.), Operator (Maior que, Menor que, etc.), Action (Pausar campanha, etc.)
frontend_ui.Requires approval checkbox: PASS - 'Requer aprovacao humana antes de executar'

notes.agency_module: Separate file agency.py imported in server.py, routes under /api/agency/
notes.access_control: Admin users have automatic access, others need explicit grant via /api/agency/access/grant
notes.dynamic_name: Agency name is '{agent_name} Agency' based on user settings (e.g., 'NovaClawAgency')
notes.metrics_structure: Products have metrics: ctr, cpc, cpa, roas, conversions, spend, revenue
